question: Write an HTTP GET with timeout returning body as string. Show in TypeScript, Python, Go, Rust, and Bash.
Write a function that POSTs JSON to an API and handles non-200 responses as errors. Show in TypeScript, Python, and Go.
Write a simple HTTP server responding Hello World on GET / and 404 on other paths. Show in TypeScript, Python, Go, and Rust.
Write a function that polls an API every N seconds until a condition is met or timeout. Show in TypeScript, Python, and Go.
Write a WebSocket client that connects, sends a message, and prints responses. Show in TypeScript and Python.
